hero.subtitle: Connect with certified professionals for focused, one-time micro-consultations. No commitments, no waiting — just the right help at the right moment.

howItWorks.title: How MindSpot Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From assessment to consultation in under 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Our AI engine classifies your emotional state, assesses urgency, and evaluates risk to personalize your experience.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm connects you with the most suitable certified professional based on your specific needs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Have a focused, private chat session with your matched professional — no long-term commitments required.

services.title: Why MindSpot
services.subtitle: Purpose-built for immediate, on-demand micro-therapy sessions.
services.feat1Desc: Our classification engine identifies emotional issues, assesses urgency levels, and performs risk evaluation in real-time.
services.feat2Desc: Connect with professionals in minutes, not weeks. Our platform ensures high availability around the clock.
services.feat3Desc: End-to-end encrypted conversations. Your mental health data is protected with the highest security standards.
services.feat4Desc: Our algorithm analyzes your needs, preferences, and urgency to pair you with the ideal certified professional.

footer.tagline: On-demand micro-therapy with certified professionals. Immediate, focused, and private.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.desc: Millions of people face daily mental health challenges but can't access traditional therapy due to cost, wait times, or stigma.
problem.f1: Average wait time for a therapist appointment: 3–6 weeks
problem.f2: Over 60% of people who need help never seek it
problem.f3: High costs and rigid schedules create real barriers

solution.title: What is MindSpot?
solution.desc: MindSpot is an on-demand micro-therapy platform that connects people with licensed therapists for focused, single-session consultations — instantly.
solution.f2: Connect with a therapist in minutes, not weeks
solution.f3: Certified professionals, verified before they join

patient.title: For Patients
patient.desc: As a patient, you describe what you're going through and our AI matches you to the right therapist — then you book, pay, and chat.
patient.f1: Triage: describe your situation and get matched by AI
patient.f2: Book a session and pay securely via Stripe
patient.f3: Real-time encrypted chat with your therapist

therapist.title: For Therapists
therapist.desc: Therapists join after an AI + license verification process. They set their own schedule, accept consultations, and get paid automatically.
therapist.f1: License verified automatically by the system
therapist.f2: Manage availability and accept sessions from a dashboard
therapist.f3: Automatic payouts after each completed consultation

tech.title: How It Works — Under the Hood
tech.desc: MindSpot is built on a .NET 8 backend with RavenDB, real-time SignalR chat, AI-powered matching, and end-to-end encryption.
tech.f1: AES-256-GCM encryption for all clinical records
tech.f2: AI matching via OpenAI embeddings + vector search
tech.f3: SignalR WebSocket chat with full audit logging

specializations.title: Licensed Professional Care
specializations.subtitle: Every therapist on our platform is a licensed clinical professional who has undergone a rigorous vetting process. We match you with specialists based on your unique needs.
specializations.clinicalDesc: Evidence-based therapy for depression, anxiety, and complex emotional challenges.
specializations.cbtDesc: Structured techniques to transform thought patterns and manage intense emotions.
specializations.relationshipDesc: Specialized support for couples and family dynamics to build healthier connections.
specializations.traumaDesc: Compassionate care and specialized protocols for healing from past experiences.
specializations.adolescentDesc: Tailored approaches for teenagers navigating modern social and academic stress.
specializations.growthDesc: Executive coaching and mindfulness strategies for self-actualization.
specializations.verificationQuote: Every therapist on the platform holds an active professional license, verified against the Ministry of Health registry before they're approved to practice.
